name: Loza Table Lamp - 27.25 Inch Height - TBL4555 - White Washed - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Loza table lamp, a beautiful blend of style and craftsmanship. Standing at 27.25 inches, its white washed finish adds a soft, calming touch to any room. Crafted from resin, this lamp showcases a sleek design that complements both modern and classic decor. The subtle curves and smooth texture create a sense of harmony, casting a warm, inviting glow. Perfect for a bedside table or living room centerpiece, Loza offers a sophisticated touch to your home decor while enhancing your ambiance. Experience the blend of artistry and function with Loza and transform your space effortlessly.
